name: Harvest-Time Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. See Recipe 12.
2. You can substitute 1 fresh clove of garlic, minced, or 1/8 teaspoon of salt.
3. Wash and trim the mushrooms; then slice them.
4. Thinly slice the zucchini (about 4 cups).
5. Cut each tomato into 8 wedges.
6. Prepare the basic meatballs and set aside.
7. Melt the margarine in a large skillet.
8. Add the garlic, thyme leaves, mushrooms, and zucchini; cook over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Add the cooked meatballs; cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender (about 10 minutes).
10. Sprinkle with salt and cheese.
11. Add the tomato wedges; cover and heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
